name: Client Intelligence Briefing (Pre-Call Partner Pack)
description: Pre-call partner briefing pack: matter status, billing posture, open items, relationship notes, and any industry/regulatory context. Assembled in under 10 seconds. Replaces Clio Grow / CRM, Clio Insights client reports, and manual partner prep.
promptTemplate: Generate a pre-call partner briefing for client {{clientNumber}}. Briefing date: {{briefingDate}}. Include matter status, billing posture, open items, and relationship notes. {{description}}

substitutions.description: Include any specific topics for the call agenda here.
